label: UKMTO: Critical
description: Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed by Iran since 28 Feb 2026; IRGC continues attacks on commercial vessels with missiles, UAVs and USVs, and sea mines reported. UKMTO logged further attacks on two cargo vessels (off Sirik and 78nm N of Fujairah) in late April. Red Sea elevated — Houthis joined the Iran war 28 Mar 2026 and have threatened Bab el-Mandeb closure; Maersk has resumed transits but most operators remain rerouted. Gulf of Aden piracy resurgent: cargo vessel seized NE of Garacad on 26 Apr 2026; Q1 2026 hijackings reported by IMB.
